category_sources: source_facts.description says Last.fm reporting client for MPD; official client page says mpdscribble submits MPD track information to Last.fm.
display_name_sources: Official Music Player Daemon client page heading is mpdscribble; source_facts.name is mpdscribble.
docs_sources: Official client page does not list dedicated docs beyond project and repository links; official README is the best documentation surface.
repo_sources: Official mpdscribble client page links to a git repository; linked GitHub repository is MusicPlayerDaemon/mpdscribble.
tags_sources: Official client page describes MPD track submission to Last.fm and lists C++ implementation/features.
